$comment: Crosswalk from the DISCOM's OMS FAULT_REASON master pick-list (vendor/India-specific, FORM_ID 8312) to the standardized OutageNotification cause.category + cause.subcategory, aligned to IEEE 1782-2022 §4.4 (ten cause categories) and §4.5 (subcategories), used with IEEE 1366. The vendor code is carried verbatim in cause.code (codeNamespace 'discom-oms'). The source pick-list is operational and contains duplicates (see notes). Load-shedding / rostering has no IEEE 1782 cause category: scheduled rostering maps to PLANNED, forced/emergency rostering to OTHER, with the rostering nature carried in outageClass. affectedEquipment hints align to IEEE 1782 §4.6.

codes.label: Rostering
codes.note: Scheduled, pre-announced rotational load-shedding -> Planned; rostering nature in outageClass.

codes.label: Storm/lightening/heavy rain
codes.note: Storm-led; if specifically lightning-caused use LIGHTNING/DIRECT_STRIKE or INDIRECT_STRIKE.

codes.label: 33KV Line Fault
codes.note: 33kV sub-transmission feeding the 33/11 substation; if treated as distribution primary use EQUIPMENT.

codes.label: Fire
codes.note: External fire; if originating within utility equipment use EQUIPMENT (cf. code 24).

codes.label: Power Transformer Fault
codes.note: Substation transformer is a distribution-substation component -> EQUIPMENT, not POWER_SUPPLY.

codes.label: Overload
codes.note: IEEE treats overload as Equipment-Equipment error; duplicate of code 26.

codes.label: Pole damaged/fallen
codes.note: If weather/vehicle-induced, record the initiating contributory factor (IEEE 1782 §4.7).

codes.label: Animal/bird dead on line
codes.note: Set subcategory MAMMAL or BIRD per field finding.

codes.label: Accident
codes.note: Vehicle accident; use PUBLIC/OTHER if non-vehicle.

codes.label: Tree fallen on line
codes.note: Set WITHIN_CLEARANCE_ZONE or OUTSIDE_CLEARANCE_ZONE per field finding.

codes.label: System improvement work
codes.note: Or OTHER if not new construction.

codes.label: DT Damaged/DT Fuse Burnt/Fire on DT
Fire in Control Room/Switchyard
codes.note: Fire within utility equipment -> Equipment (not Public, cf. code 8).

codes.label: Shutdown for External Agency Infrastructure Works
Transmission Rostering
codes.note: Scheduled rostering imposed by the SLDC/grid operator -> Planned/Other utility request.

codes.label: Other than Schedule Rostering
codes.note: Forced/unscheduled load-shed -> not Planned; nature in outageClass.

codes.label: System Improvement Work/Deposit Works
codes.note: Deposit (customer-funded) works may instead be CUSTOMER_REQUEST.

codes.label: Other Transient Fault
codes.note: Transient fault, no sustained cause found; use OTHER if a known cause applies.
